1_HTML_Basics: HTML Document Structure: DOCTYPE, html, head, body
Semantic HTML5 Elements: header, nav, main, section, article, aside, footer
Links and Anchors: href, target, rel attributes
Images: src, alt, width, height, loading=lazy
Tables: table, thead, tbody, tfoot, th, td, colspan, rowspan
Forms: form, input types, label, select, textarea, button
Form Validation Attributes: required, pattern, min, max
HTML5 Input Types: email, url, date, range, color, search
Media Elements: video, audio, source, track
Meta Tags: charset, viewport, description, og tags
2_CSS_Basics: Ways to Apply CSS: Inline, Internal, External
CSS Selectors: Element, Class, ID, Attribute, Pseudo-class, Pseudo-element
Box Model: content, padding, border, margin
Display Property: block, inline, inline-block, none
Positioning: static, relative, absolute, fixed, sticky
Colors: Named, Hex, RGB, RGBA, HSL, HSLA
Typography: font-family, font-size, font-weight, line-height, letter-spacing
Background Properties: color, image, repeat, position, size
CSS Units: px, em, rem, %, vw, vh, vmin, vmax
3_CSS_Layout: Flexbox: flex-grow, flex-shrink, flex-basis, flex shorthand
CSS Grid: gap, justify-items, align-items, place-items
CSS Grid: auto-fill vs auto-fit with minmax()
4_CSS_Advanced: CSS Transitions: transition-property, duration, timing-function, delay
CSS Transforms: translate, rotate, scale, skew, matrix
CSS Filters: blur, brightness, contrast, grayscale
CSS Preprocessors: Sass/SCSS (variables, nesting, mixins, extends, functions)
CSS Methodologies: BEM, OOCSS, SMACSS, Atomic CSS
Tailwind CSS: Utility-first approach, configuration, JIT mode
5_JavaScript_Basics: Variables: var, let, const — Scope and Hoisting
Data Types: Primitive (string, number, bigint, boolean, null, undefined, symbol) and Object
Operators: Arithmetic, Comparison (== vs ===), Logical, Nullish Coalescing (??), Optional Chaining (?.)
Control Flow: if-else, switch, for, while, do-while, for...of, for...in
6_JavaScript_Core_Concepts: Closures: Definition, Use Cases, Memory Implications
The Event Loop: Call Stack, Web APIs, Callback Queue, Microtask Queue
this keyword: Global, Function, Method, Arrow Function, new
Classes: constructor, methods, static, extends, super
7_JavaScript_Async: Promise Combinators: Promise.all(), Promise.race(), Promise.allSettled(), Promise.any()
Error Handling with try-catch in async functions
Fetch API: GET, POST, Headers, Body
CORS: What it is and how to handle it
8_JavaScript_DOM: DOM Tree: Document, Element, Text Nodes
Traversing the DOM: parentNode, children, nextSibling
Creating and Modifying Elements: createElement, appendChild, innerHTML, textContent
CSS Classes: classList.add, remove, toggle, contains
Event Object: target, currentTarget, preventDefault, stopPropagation
9_JavaScript_Advanced: Functional Programming Concepts: Pure Functions, Immutability, Composition
Design Patterns: Module, Singleton, Observer, Factory, Strategy
JSON: parse, stringify, handling circular references
10_Browser_and_Web_Performance: How Browsers Work: Parsing, Rendering, Painting
Performance Metrics: FCP, LCP, CLS, FID, TTFB
Caching Strategies: HTTP Cache, Service Worker Cache
Image Optimization: WebP, AVIF, srcset, sizes

Secure Cookie Attributes: HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite
